n % n %

Chi-square

##
##  Pearson's Chi-squared test with Yates' continuity correction
##
## data:  df$procon_method and df$procon_valence
## X-squared = 17.95, df = 1, p-value = 2.267e-05
##                 df$procon_valence
## df$procon_method  Negative  Positive
